== Butiran bibliografi bagi {{FULLPAGENAME}} == * Nama halaman: {{FULLPAGENAME}} * Pengarang: Penyumbang {{SITENAME}} * Penerbit: ''{{SITENAME}}''. * Tarikh semakan terakhir: {{CURRENTDAY}} {{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}} {{CURRENTTIME}} UTC * Tarikh dicapai: {{CURRENTDAY}} {{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}} {{CURRENTTIME}} UTC * URL kekal: {{canonicalurl:{{FULLPAGENAME}}|oldid={{REVISIONID}}}} * ID Versi Halaman: {{REVISIONID}}
== Gaya petikan bagi {{FULLPAGENAME}} == === [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/APA_style Gaya APA] === {{FULLPAGENAME}}. ({{CURRENTYEAR}}, {{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTDAY}}). ''{{SITENAME}}''. Dicapai pada {{CURRENTDAY}} {{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}, daripada {{canonicalurl:{{FULLPAGENAME}}|oldid={{REVISIONID}}}}. === [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/MLA_Handbook#MLA_Style_Manual Gaya MLA] === "{{FULLPAGENAME}}." ''{{SITENAME}}''. {{CURRENTDAY}} {{CURRENTMONTHABBREV}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}, {{CURRENTTIME}} UTC. <{{canonicalurl:{{FULLPAGENAME}}|oldid={{REVISIONID}}}}> {{CURRENTDAY}} {{CURRENTMONTHABBREV}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}, {{CURRENTTIME}}. === [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/MHRA_Style_Guide Gaya MHRA] === Penyumbang {{SITENAME}}, '{{FULLPAGENAME}}', ''{{SITENAME}},'' {{CURRENTDAY}} {{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}, {{CURRENTTIME}} UTC, <{{canonicalurl:{{FULLPAGENAME}}|oldid={{REVISIONID}}}}> [dicapai pada {{CURRENTDAY}} {{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}] === [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/The_Chicago_Manual_of_Style Gaya Chicago] === Penyumbang {{SITENAME}}, "{{FULLPAGENAME}}," ''{{SITENAME}},'' {{canonicalurl:{{FULLPAGENAME}}|oldid={{REVISIONID}}}} (dicapai pada {{CURRENTDAY}} {{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}). === [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Council_of_Science_Editors Gaya CBE/CSE] === Penyumbang {{SITENAME}}. {{FULLPAGENAME}} [Internet]. {{SITENAME}}; {{CURRENTYEAR}} {{CURRENTMONTHABBREV}} {{CURRENTDAY}}, {{CURRENTTIME}} UTC [dipetik {{CURRENTYEAR}} {{CURRENTMONTHABBREV}} {{CURRENTDAY}}]. Tersedia daripada: {{canonicalurl:{{FULLPAGENAME}}|oldid={{REVISIONID}}}}. === [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Bluebook Gaya Bluebook] === {{FULLPAGENAME}}, {{canonicalurl:{{FULLPAGENAME}}|oldid={{REVISIONID}}}} (terakhir dilawati pada {{CURRENTDAY}} {{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}). === Entri [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/BibTeX BibTeX] ===   @misc{ wiki:xxx,     author = "{{SITENAME}}",     title = "{{FULLPAGENAME}} --- {{SITENAME}}{,} {{int:sitesubtitle}}",     year = "{{CURRENTYEAR}}",     url = "{{canonicalurl:{{FULLPAGENAME}}|oldid={{REVISIONID}}}}",     note = "[Dalam talian; dicapai pada {{CURRENTDAY}}-{{CURRENTMONTHNAME}}-{{CURRENTYEAR}}]"   } Apabila menggunakan pakej url [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/LaTeX LaTeX] (\usepackage{url} di mana-mana bahagian prambel) yang cenderung memberikan format alamat web yang lebih kemas, yang berikut mungkin lebih diutamakan:   @misc{ wiki:xxx,     author = "{{SITENAME}}",     title = "{{FULLPAGENAME}} --- {{SITENAME}}{,} {{int:sitesubtitle}}",     year = "{{CURRENTYEAR}}",     url = "'''\url{'''{{canonicalurl:{{FULLPAGENAME}}|oldid={{REVISIONID}}}}'''}'''",     note = "[Dalam talian; dicapai pada {{CURRENTDAY}}-{{CURRENTMONTHNAME}}-{{CURRENTYEAR}}]"   }
